scores.dimension_name: Net Zero commitment and transition plan
scores.scoring_rationale: The statement expresses support for a low-carbon economy but contains no dated Net Zero commitment, baseline year, transition plan, or interim target. Carbon footprint reduction language is generic and not sufficient for a Net Zero score.
No Scope 1 or Scope 2 emissions figures are disclosed. There is also no GHG Protocol methodology, organisational boundary, or location-based/market-based Scope 2 reporting.
No Scope 3 emissions inventory, categories, or materiality assessment are disclosed. A general reference to working with suppliers is not enough to evidence Scope 3 disclosure.
The document contains no evidence of third-party assurance, assurance provider, assurance standard, or verified emissions boundary. It is a self-reported web statement only.
No quantified emissions reduction targets are disclosed, and there is no evidence of SBTi validation. The document does not claim science-based targets.

overall_notes: Disclosure quality is weak: the document is a short web statement with broad environmental commitments but no quantitative emissions data, targets, methodology, baseline, assurance, or SBTi validation. The only scored evidence is a limited set of operational practices such as recycling, energy-efficient lighting, staff practices, and supplier improvement discussions; these do not materially support the rubric dimensions.
